brand-story-img-6d34fa.query: Jewelry That Tells Your Story At Velmora, we believe fine jewelry should be accessible without compromise. Every piece is crafted in 18K gold plate over brass, designed in our atelier and made to be worn, loved, and passed down. We're redefining what it means to invest in yourself — one beautiful piece at a time.
